title: Suggest Resolve Evidence Script Conventions — Filename, CMD Guard, Environment Caveats
desc: Complete rules for writing evidence scripts that pass wkappbot suggest resolve's strict guards. Learned the hard way across 3 failed attempts. Save before forgetting: filename pattern, CMD execution requirement, hidden-window environment limits, set -e pitfalls.
steps: cmd. Example: test-file-read-score-signal-module.sh. The {cmd} part is validated against known wkappbot commands (a11y, file, web, skill, logcat, etc.). Using unknown command = WARN but usually accepted. Using no pattern at all = REJECT with 'Evidence filename must follow:' error.

CMD EXECUTION GUARD: evidence script MUST execute actual wkappbot-core.exe commands. Guard scans stdout for [CMD] entries — if zero, resolve FAILS with 'CMD execution guard FAILED: no [CMD] entries'. A pure Python test script does NOT count. Include at least 1-2 'wkappbot-core.exe <cmd>' invocations even if just verification (e.g., file read, skill show).

SCRIPT ENVIRONMENT CAVEATS: wkappbot runs evidence via `StartTracked cwd=... exe=bash shell=False nowin=True`. This means: (a) no $(dirname "$0") resolution — 'dirname: command not found', (b) no `head`/`tail` — not in PATH, (c) hidden window so no interactive input, (d) stdout/stderr interleaved in unpredictable order due to parallel output from wkappbot-core subprocess. Use ABSOLUTE PATHS only. Redirect head/tail with python or sed alternatives.
SET -E PITFALLS: 'set -e' + wkappbot commands with exit≠0 will abort script before python tests run. Wrap optional wkappbot calls with `
true` to allow continuation. Example: `"$WKB" file read ...

BACKUP FILES: every suggest resolve creates .bak-{timestamp}-resolve.txt in <repo-root>\bin\wkappbot.hq\experience\tests\{cmd}\{subcmd}\ — even on failure. Overlap detection kicks in: >=90% similar script rejected. Rename/rewrite if iterating.

FLAG BOILERPLATE: Required for resolve: --i-completed-the-code-and-built-successfully-and-deployed-and-tested-with-real-scenarios-and-confirmed-meaningful-results-and-have-evidence-and-willkim-allowed-this-script. This is not optional — suggest rejects without it.
true\n# run actual verification python/test here

UPLOAD BEHAVIOR: on successful resolve, wkappbot uploads the evidence .sh to Slack thread via bot token. Confirm by checking Slack for uploaded file after resolve succeeds. Recovery ZIP also created under bin/wkappbot.hq/recovery/.
author: claude
